name: Rajesh P
title: Co-Founder & Frontend Engineer | AI Product Builder
tagline: I build products from ideas — and turn them into real, usable systems.
summary: I am a growth-minded frontend engineer and AI product builder who celebrates 1% daily improvements. I specialize in turning complex ideas into functional, production-ready systems, with a focus on clean architecture and high-end user experiences.
about: I am a disciplined solo builder who believes in 'building in public' and sharing my journey openly. I am honest about my failures and proactive about helping others. My journey from a B.Sc. graduate to a Co-Founder and Research Executive has been fueled by sheer determination and a passion for AI systems.

highlights: Built and launched LucidExtractor from 0→1 in ~4 months
Led end-to-end product: research, architecture, frontend, launch
Stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Node.js, MongoDB
Built AI-powered Data Cleanup Platform (production SaaS tool)
Automated workflows, handled team + client deliverables, project management
Stack: Next.js, Gemini API, Redis Cloud, Bull Queue, MongoDB, Node.js
Awards: Zinnov Dashing Debut Award (2024), Extra Mile Award (2025)

projects.name: LucidExtractor
projects.subtitle: AI-powered web scraping + SEO platform
projects.description: Helping developers extract structured data from dynamic and bot-protected websites with precision.
projects.problem: Traditional scrapers fail against JS-rich sites and anti-bot systems.
projects.solution: Built a headless browser API with rotation logic and AI-based structured formatting.
projects.impact: Launched 0→1 as a SaaS. Reduced data curation time by 80% for initial users.

projects.name: AI Data Cleanup Platform
projects.subtitle: Enterprise data verification tool
projects.description: Production tool for scale verification of messy software product datasets across multiple data sources.
projects.problem: Handling 10k+ rows of messy vendor data was manual and error-prone.
projects.solution: Implemented a background job queue (Bull) with LLM grounding (Gemini) for 99% accuracy.
projects.impact: Production-grade internal tool currently streamlining Zinnov's product research.

projects.name: Saktrix UI Library
projects.subtitle: 240+ open-source React components
projects.description: A comprehensive UI standard featuring highly performant and accessible web components.
projects.problem: Development teams waste thousands of hours rewriting common UI patterns.
projects.solution: Created a lightweight, copy-paste standard with 240+ components and deep animation hooks.
projects.impact: Open-source contribution with 10k+ potential component variations.

projects.name: Jayam E-Commerce
projects.subtitle: Full-stack shopping app
projects.description: An end-to-end shopping experience featuring advanced inventory and order management.
projects.problem: E-commerce apps often struggle with state management and real-time stock sync.
projects.solution: Leveraged Firestore real-time listeners and Zustand for lightning-fast UI updates.
projects.impact: Successfully handled 100+ simulated concurrent orders during stress testing.

projects.name: CNAPP Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Dynamic cloud security dashboard
projects.description: Visualizing complex security metrics and vulnerability scans in a clean, widget-based UI.
projects.problem: Security analysts are overwhelmed by messy, tabular log data.
projects.solution: Built a JSON-driven widget engine that converts raw logs into prioritized visual tasks.
projects.impact: Reduced security notification fatigue by filtering non-critical noise by 40%.

projects.name: Saktrix AI UI
projects.subtitle: AI-powered UI component library
projects.description: An intelligent UI library that allows developers to dynamically customize and generate component designs using AI-driven inputs.
projects.problem: Designing and customizing UI components manually is time-consuming and lacks flexibility.
projects.solution: Built an AI-integrated component system that enables real-time design transformation and rapid UI generation.
projects.impact: Accelerated UI development speed and improved design flexibility for modern applications.

projects.name: Saktrix Startup Website
projects.subtitle: Full-feature startup website demo
projects.description: A complete startup website showcasing services, blog integration, email support, and a scalable UI structure for real-world use cases.
projects.problem: Early-stage startups struggle to quickly build professional, feature-rich websites.
projects.solution: Developed a production-ready website template with essential features like blog, contact, and responsive UI.
projects.impact: Provides a ready-to-use foundation for startups to launch faster with minimal setup.

projects.name: Cube Assignment Website
projects.subtitle: Pixel-perfect frontend implementation
projects.description: A high-precision frontend project built from Figma designs using pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript without AI assistance.
projects.problem: Achieving pixel-perfect UI from design files requires precision and strong frontend fundamentals.
projects.solution: Manually developed the entire interface ensuring exact design matching and responsiveness.
projects.impact: Delivered a clean, accurate UI implementation demonstrating strong core frontend skills.

projects.name: SaaS Dashboard Store
projects.subtitle: Multi-dashboard UI system
projects.description: A dashboard platform featuring multiple pre-built layouts including Financial and BI dashboards for analytics and data visualization.
projects.problem: Businesses need ready-made dashboard solutions for different data use cases.
projects.solution: Created reusable dashboard templates optimized for analytics, financial tracking, and business intelligence.
projects.impact: Simplifies dashboard development and reduces time to build data-driven interfaces.

projects.name: Liceron Startup Website
projects.subtitle: Official startup platform
projects.description: A modern startup website designed to represent the brand, services, and digital presence of Liceron.
projects.problem: Startups need a strong digital presence to establish credibility and attract clients.
projects.solution: Built a clean, responsive website with structured content and modern UI design.
projects.impact: Strengthened brand identity and improved online visibility for the startup.
